# urllo_hosts (Data Source)

Lists all source hosts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "urllo_hosts" "all" {}

output "host_names" {
  value = [for h in data.urllo_hosts.all.hosts : h.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `hosts` (Attributes List) The source hosts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hosts))

<a id="nestedatt--hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hosts`

Read-Only:

- `certificate_status` (String) Certificate status.
- `dns_status` (String) DNS status.
- `id` (String) Host identifier.
- `name` (String) Hostname.
